title: Automatic Storage, Recursion, VLAs, and Escaping Addresses · Invariant Recall
summary: After a delay, a release reviewer reconstructs the bounded stack-use redesign contract from partial traces, compares two near-miss implementations, and retrieves prior bounds and lifetime rules before feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded stack-use redesign after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep pointers to automatic objects within the execution and subobject lifetimes that make them valid.
Bound recursion by adversarial input depth, frame cost, and target stack limits or replace it with explicit storage.
Use variable-length arrays only under explicit positive bounds and stack budgets, with portable alternatives.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Escape Analysis Review
steps.instruction:
review case — A review native-systems team handles memory case 3738. Produce bounded C evidence to replace unbounded recursive work with bounded explicit storage; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Trace every stored or returned pointer back to its referent lifetime, including compound literals and callback contexts.

Inspect the Escape Analysis Review trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Escape Analysis Review.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace every stored or returned pointer back to its referent lifetime, including compound literals and callback contexts. For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Escape Analysis Review, keep Escape Analysis Review connected to executable C memory invariant and explicit native transfer evidence.
